name: Dragon Knight
description: The Dragon Slyrak sleeps within this armor, and the knight within the Dragon waits. Beware you do not wake them both.

abilities.name: Dragon Blood
abilities.description: The Eldwurm-blood infused knight in dragon form has nigh impenetrable armor and health regeneration. Base Health Regen Bonus: 2 (14). Health Regen Bonus per Level: 0.5. Base Armor Bonus: 2 (14). Armor Bonus per Level: 0.5. Health Regen Bonus Factor: 1.5. Armor Bonus Factor: 1.5.

abilities.name: Breathe Fire
abilities.description: Unleashes a breath of fire in front of Dragon Knight that burns enemies and reduces the damage their attacks deal. Cast Range: 1000. First Radius: 150. Travel Distance: 750. End Radius: 250. Damage: 80/160/240/320 (280/360/440/520). Attack Damage Reduction: 20%/24%/28%/32%. Cooldown: 14/13/12/11 (12/11/10/9). Mana Cost: 90/95/100/105.

abilities.name: Dragon Tail
abilities.description: Smites an enemy unit in melee range with his shield, stunning it while dealing minor damage. Cast Range: 150. Projectile Speed: 0. Damage: 60/90/120/150. Stun Duration: 1.8/2/2.2/2.4 (2.2/2.4/2.6/2.8). Cooldown: 16/14/12/10. Mana Cost: 70/80/90/100.

abilities.name: Wyrm's Wrath
abilities.description: The life blood of the Dragon improves Dragon Knight's abilities and items to have increased Ao E and causes his attacks to deal additional magic damage to enemy units. Magic Damage Bonus: 10/20/30/40 (15/30/45/60). Ao E Bonus: 25/50/75/100 (37.5/75/112.5/150).

abilities.name: Fireball
abilities.description: Dealing damage over time within the radius. Has reduced cast range in human form. Cast Range: 600. Radius: 275. Damage per Second: 85. Duration: 6. Aura Linger Duration: 2. Cast Range: 1400. Cooldown: 20. Mana Cost: 80.

abilities.name: Elder Dragon Form
abilities.description: Increases the current level of Dragon Form by one. Adds a Level 4 Black Dragon that has free pathing, bonus magic resistance, and increased other bonuses. Attack Range Bonus: 350 (500). Ability Range Bonus: 350. Damage per Second: 25/25/25/35. Debuff Duration: 3. Radius: 0/375/375/450. Splash Attack Damage: 0%/75%/75%/100%. Cooldown: 100. Mana Cost: 50.
